title: Arista Networks, Inc. Reports Fourth Quarter and Year End 2025 Financial Results

title: Arista EOS Cloud Network Operating System

note: Describes CloudVision as Arista's platform for network lifecycle automation and multi-domain management.

note: Documents that Arista completed its IPO on June 6, 2014 at a public offering price of $43.00 per share.

title: Clouds Rise As Arista Networks Shares Pop 28% As It Raises $226M In IPO
note: Contemporaneous IPO coverage supporting Arista's June 6, 2014 debut and approximately $2.75 billion IPO valuation.

title: SONiC GitHub Repository
note: Documents SONiC as a free and open-source Linux-based network operating system for switches from multiple vendors and ASICs.

title: SONiC Architecture
note: Provides architecture context for SONiC as an open-source NOS based on Debian Linux and using the Switch Abstraction Interface.

title: FRRouting
note: Documents FRRouting as a free and open-source Internet routing protocol suite for Linux and Unix platforms.

title: FRRouting GitHub Organization
note: Provides public repository evidence for FRRouting development and source availability.

title: Nautobot GitHub Repository
note: Documents Nautobot as an open-source network source-of-truth and automation platform.

title: OpenConfig
note: Describes OpenConfig as an open source project for vendor-neutral network models and streaming telemetry.

title: gRPC Network Management Interface Specification
note: Defines gNMI as the gRPC-based interface for network management and telemetry operations.

title: gNMI Authentication and Encryption
note: Explains authentication, encryption, authorization, and accounting expectations for secure gNMI management channels.
